rationale: Add grammar alternatives to cover under‑explored scenarios such as remote template sources, nested extra_context, varied newlines, complex copy_without_render patterns, partial hooks, and partial replay payloads.

updates.replacement:
newline_value
    : '"\\n"'
    | '"\\r\\n"'
    // additional carriage‑return only line ending
    | '"\\r"'
    | 'null'
    ;

copy_without_render_array
    : '[]'
    | '[' '"{{cookiecutter.repo_name}}/assets/*"' ']'
    | '[' '"{{cookiecutter.repo_name}}/rendered/*.yml"' ']'
    // multiple glob patterns, mixing binary and text paths
    | '[' '"{{cookiecutter.repo_name}}/assets/*"' ',' '"{{cookiecutter.repo_name}}/templates/**/*.txt"' ']'
    ;

hooks_object
    : '{'
      '"pre_prompt"' ':' hook_script ','
      '"pre_gen_project"' ':' hook_script ','
      '"post_gen_project"' ':' hook_script
      '}'
    // partial hooks: some null, some valid scripts
    | '{'
      '"pre_prompt"' ':' 'null' ','
      '"pre_gen_project"' ':' hook_script ','
      '"post_gen_project"' ':' 'null'
      '}'
    ;

replay_value
    : 'null'
    | '{' '"cookiecutter"' ':' '{'
         '"project_name"' ':' '"Replay Project"' ','
         '"repo_name"' ':' '"replay_project"' ','
         '"use_docker"' ':' 'true'
       '}' '}'
    // partial replay payload with only a subset of keys
    | '{' '"cookiecutter"' ':' '{'
         '"project_name"' ':' '"Partial Replay"'
       '}' '}'
    ;
